audit_scope: OPL stage execution plan route handler refs
generated CLI/MCP/product-entry/domain_handler descriptor/status/session/workbench wrappers with RCA domain-handler targets

high_risk_surfaces_not_migrated: visual route truth and family profile policy
generic_surfaces_for_opl_or_shared_runti: attempt ledger and route-run event persistence
OPL-generated CLI/MCP/product-entry/domain_action_adapter descriptor/status wrappers with RCA domain-handler targets
migration_gates_before_code_retirement: generated/default caller parity proven for the replacement OPL surface
owner receipt roundtrip or no-regression proof recorded
no compatibility alias or retired public path restored
no visual truth, artifact blob, memory body, review/export verdict, or owner receipt authority moved to OPL

activeCallers: OPL generated product session domain snapshot refs
OPL generated session shell continuation target
modules.migrationAction: Generic session persistence/currentness sources are retired; keep only the RCA domain snapshot refs handler consumed through the OPL generated product-entry session surface.
modules.retentionReason: RCA retains domain snapshot, deliverable locator, currentness and domain authority refs without a repo-local session store.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can own session shell UX but cannot own RCA deliverable truth, review/export gate or visual session authority.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: The generic session sources are retired; the remaining RCA domain snapshot refs handler is current domain behavior.

activeCallers: OPL generated source wrapper invokes RCA source readiness handler
modules.migrationAction: Keep generic workspace locator, source receipt shell, material gap queue and provenance navigation in OPL; RCA returns source readiness and visual source pack refs only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA must judge visual source readiness, audience promise inputs and communication strategy source adequacy.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can host source transport but cannot own RCA source readiness verdict or narrative/visual source interpretation.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: workspace_source_intake is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

modules.migrationAction: Keep body-free memory transport, freshness grouping and receipt inventory shell in OPL; RCA returns memory decision and receipt refs only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA owns visual pattern memory body, accept/reject decision and lesson quality semantics.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL must not store visual memory body or decide whether a visual pattern is reusable for RCA deliverables.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: memory_writeback_receipt_transport is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

modules.migrationAction: Consume OPL/App generic artifact inventory, gallery, restore/provenance navigation and handoff shell; keep RCA artifact authority and export verdict refs only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA owns canonical visual artifacts, exportability verdict and artifact mutation permission.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL may index artifact refs but cannot publish, mutate or declare RCA visual artifacts exportable.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: artifact_export_lifecycle is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

modules.migrationAction: Keep blocked-item queue, rerun envelope, human approval lane and repair transport shell in OPL; RCA returns review/export verdict and repair target refs only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA owns visual review/export verdicts, blocked-item meaning and repair target selection.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL transport cannot decide if a slide/page is visually acceptable, exportable or needs a specific RCA repair route.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: review_repair_transport is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

modules.migrationAction: Keep helper registration, environment/provisioning metadata, execution receipt and operator-safe launch envelope in OPL; RCA owns the native helper implementation and route-specific proof refs.
modules.retentionReason: RCA owns PPT/image/export helper implementation and route-specific mutation/review integration.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can standardize execution envelope but cannot own domain helper logic that mutates RCA visual artifacts.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: native_helper_envelope is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

activeCallers: OPL generated product status/workbench consumes RCA operator evidence refs
modules.migrationAction: Keep generic dashboard/workbench layout, attention queue, repair command projection and drilldown shell in OPL App; RCA returns domain evidence refs, blocker meaning and safe repair hints only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA provides domain evidence refs, blocker meaning and safe repair hints for visual deliverable readiness.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL App may render projections but cannot turn them into RCA visual ready/exportable claims.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: operator_projection_shell is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

activeCallers: OPL generated CLI/MCP wrapper domain handler targets
OPL generated protocol descriptor targeting RCA domain handlers
modules.migrationAction: Use OPL standard domain-agent scaffold for generic wrapper generation, command surface registration and MCP action scaffolding; RCA keeps action metadata and domain handlers only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA retains canonical action metadata and domain handlers because they encode visual deliverable authority boundaries.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can generate wrappers but cannot own RCA action semantics or guarded domain handler authority.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: generic_cli_mcp_wrappers is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

modules.migrationAction: Keep executor lifecycle/provisioning, attempt ledger ownership, route-run record persistence policy, event log ownership, stale-running-run audit read model, and generic route dependency/continuation orchestration in OPL generic Agent Executor Adapter and route attempt shell; RCA returns route policy, neutral route-run refs, and receipt refs only.
modules.retentionReason: RCA keeps route-level executor requirements, Codex CLI as current first-class concrete executor for visual deliverables, and neutral refs-only route-run record refs until OPL attempt ledger/runtime record caller parity is proven.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can provide executor adapter and attempt record mechanics but cannot promise non-Codex outputs are visually equivalent for RCA routes or issue RCA visual review/export verdicts.
modules.semantic_equivalence_reason: RCA exposes only route-level executor policy, neutral route-run refs, executor requirement refs, executor receipt refs, typed blocker refs and no-forbidden-write refs; OPL attempt shell parity remains a bridge-exit blocker, not unresolved semantic ownership.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: codex_executor_adapter is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

modules.migrationAction: Keep observability exporter, SLO, control-loop summary, usage and resource-pressure aggregation in OPL.
modules.retentionReason: RCA contributes domain blocker meaning, visual-safe repair hints and no-regression evidence refs.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL observability cannot authorize RCA quality, exportability or visual remediation decisions.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: observability_stability_read_model is a retained RCA domain authority or refs-only projection; physical deletion would remove current domain behavior.

modules.migrationAction: Provide declarative visual pack input for OPL-generated CLI/MCP/product-entry/domain-handler/status/session/workbench/harness surfaces.
modules.retentionReason: RCA retains visual stage, action, policy, receipt and fixture declarations as domain pack input.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: OPL can generate wrappers from this input, but cannot own RCA visual truth, review/export verdicts or artifact authority.

physical_deletion_guard.reason: Declarative pack input is a required RCA domain package surface, not a generic runtime shell.

modules.migrationAction: Retain only visual authority functions while OPL generates generic wrappers and runtime shells.
modules.retentionReason: RCA must decide visual source readiness, visual direction, review/export verdicts, artifact mutation, visual memory acceptance and owner receipts.
modules.cannotAbsorbReason: These functions are RCA domain authority and cannot be moved to OPL without moving visual truth.

authority_surface_taxonomy.policy: visual/source/review/memory judgments require AI-first stage artifacts; programmatic surfaces guard owner receipts and refs only

physical_deletion_guard.reason: Minimal authority functions are the allowed RCA retention surface.
